blaze.computer

I'm Blaze, a designer and builder focused on making powerful tools simple to use. I've been working in digital design for about 20 years, creating products that are clear, fast, and fun to interact with.

In 2024, I designed UNO, the most-used wallet on World. It's built as a mini app to help people swap tokens easily inside the World Ecosystem. I also designed ORO, a daily token that verified users can claim, with extra rewards for referrals.

Outside of crypto, I created How's the Roads?, a live traffic cam viewer for Kansas City, and Holy Hues, a pocket Bible that lets you style and share verses with custom colors and fonts.

Some side projects include Color Theme Generator, a 3D color harmony viewer, and Marble Maker, a customizable marble generator with real-time lighting and export. I also helped design Party, a group chat with a wallet that lets you crowdfund, launch tokens, and coordinate onchain.

I like building things that work well and feel good to use.

experience

2022 – present At PartyDAO, contributing to the design of party.app and World apps.
2021 – 2022 Founding designer at Showtime. Also collaborated with WorkOS on marketing graphics.
2015 – 2017 At Bitovi, delivered major web projects for Lowe's and Levi's.
2013 – 2017 Freelance designer focused on experimental 3D projects, including space and weather-related visualizations.
2010 – 2012 At Scribd, focused on designing and enhancing their core website.
